track_semantics.semantic_summary: Bounded XTRAIN records a local-reference train-to-infer score lane for the promoted PGOLF family. It is comparable only inside the same XTRAIN track and does not claim public or HOMEGOLF-equivalent score posture.

primary_score.score_summary: The retained bounded XTRAIN quick-eval lane closes one local-reference validation BPB for the promoted PGOLF family under the current one-token attention-window posture.

delta_rows.delta_summary: The bounded XTRAIN lane improves BPB versus the promoted proof baseline, but the result remains non-public and does not yet upgrade into HOMEGOLF-critical score posture.

score_surface.semantic_summary: Bounded XTRAIN closes a private local-reference score, preserves its delta versus the proof baseline, and keeps promotion held because the lane is not public-equivalent and does not yet prove HOMEGOLF score relevance.

series_unavailable_reason: The retained bounded XTRAIN lane closes score and runtime parity but does not yet publish one append-only live step series in the shared visualization family.

timeline.detail: The promoted PGOLF local-reference trainer ran the bounded XTRAIN coordinate budget and preserved one non-public train-to-infer lane.
The quick-eval lane sealed one retained validation BPB for the bounded XTRAIN family under the one-token inference window.
The same retained XTRAIN bundle was decoded through direct runtime and psionic-serve with exact token parity.

summary.detail: Bounded XTRAIN now emits one shared track-aware artifact with retained BPB, proof delta, one-token decode posture, and direct-versus-served runtime parity.

event_series.detail: Bounded XTRAIN closed out retained validation BPB 4.202998 after 16 local-reference steps.
Bounded XTRAIN improved retained BPB versus the proof baseline by 5.729655.
Direct runtime and served runtime kept exact token parity at 100.624 tok/s and 100.217 tok/s.
Promotion remains held because bounded XTRAIN is not public-equivalent and still does not prove HOMEGOLF score relevance.
The bounded XTRAIN lane improved BPB but still failed exact-cycle recovery on the retained toy prompt.

source_artifacts.detail: The retained XTRAIN quick-eval report is authoritative for the bounded local-reference score, prompt behavior, and direct-versus-served runtime parity.
The XTRAIN track contract is authoritative for score-law semantics, comparability boundaries, and the explicit non-public promotion hold.
The promoted family contract remains authoritative for the PGOLF-shaped model family and bundle handoff semantics beneath the bounded XTRAIN lane.
The quick-eval audit records the retained operator interpretation around the same bounded XTRAIN score lane.
